subcodes.title: Sharh-i-Fass-i-Nigin (on the Ringstone Symbol)
subcodes.first_line: For some time you have been engaged in service in Paris and although there is much hardship and difficulty, it is service [3.5s]... ...As regards the explanation of Monsieur Angelmann(?) concerning the writing of the Greatest Name on the ringstone
subcodes.first_line_orig: مدتی شد که آنجناب در پاریس بخدمت مشغولید هر چند زحمت و مشقت بسیار است ولی خدمت
subcodes.subjects: @ringstone symbol, @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria), @Adam; Adam and Eve, @pairs in creation; male and female; B and E; agent and patient
